title: Projected degradation pressure to the finish
summary: Use current degradation and tyre age to estimate whether degradation would become problematic if the driver stayed out to the finish.
rationale: The attached run kept degradation and lap-time-loss transforms in most stronger feature stacks. A projected degradation pressure feature ties those continuous signals directly to remaining distance and current tyre age.
implementation_hint: Create degradation per TyreLife, positive cumulative degradation, clipped LapTime_Delta pressure, projected degradation over remaining laps using simple linear extrapolation, and interactions with current-tyre finish margin. Test against a version using only raw degradation columns.
expected_effect: Small AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Linear extrapolation is simplistic and may amplify outliers. Clip extreme values and avoid using future degradation trends.
